# jiehu01 — PD tremor IMU (autoencoder / extra IMU)

**Repo:** https://github.com/jiehu01/Parkinson-s-Disease-Tremor-Dataset  

Team pointed here for **a lot of IMU-style data** useful for **autoencoder / representation** pretraining. Multiple sub-datasets; check README + licenses before mixing. Clone only when someone trains on it.
